commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in safe terminal fallback metadata through agent-core and the Plugin SDK, threads fallback and delivery evidence through embedded runner/session paths, documents tool-plugin terminal fallbacks, and declares cron/web_fetch summaries.

PR surface: Source +3520, Tests +9520, Docs +79, Generated 0, Other +3. Total +13122 across 69 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main lacks the terminal fallback contract, and the PR body supplies after-fix live Discord output for scheduler and web_fetch paths, though this read-only review did not run a local current-main failure.
